title: पार्वती सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री पार्वती सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

ॐ पार्वती गिरिजा देवी हिमवत्पुत्रिका शुभा।
महादेवप्रिया नित्यं शिवा शैलसुता सती॥ १॥

उमा हैमवती गौरी कालिका शूलिनीप्रिया।
शङ्करार्धाङ्गनी देवी अर्धनारीश्वरी तथा॥ २॥

दुर्गा भवानी अम्बिका जगदम्बा जगत्प्रसूः।
महाकाली महालक्ष्मी महासरस्वती शिवा॥ ३॥

नवदुर्गा दशमहाविद्या षोडशमातृका।
नन्दिनी मेनकापुत्री दाक्षायणी सुरेश्वरी॥ ४॥

कात्यायनी महागौरी चन्द्रघण्टा कूष्माण्डिनी।
स्कन्दमाता शैलपुत्री ब्रह्मचारिणी तापसी॥ ५॥

सिद्धिदात्री कालरात्री चामुण्डा शक्तिरूपिणी।
महिषासुरमर्दिनी रक्तबीजविनाशिनी॥ ६॥

अन्नपूर्णा विशालाक्षी कामाक्षी मीनाक्षी तथा।
ललिता त्रिपुरसुन्दरी षोडशी भुवनेश्वरी॥ ७॥

वनदुर्गा विन्ध्यवासिनी सिंहवाहिनी चण्डिका।
चामुण्डेश्वरी ज्वालामुखी तारा मातङ्गिनी॥ ८॥

धूमावती बगला छिन्नमस्ता भैरवी तथा।
सरस्वती लक्ष्मी सीता राधा सत्यभामा शची॥ ९॥

सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्यं शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥ १०॥

॥ इति श्री पार्वती सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् (मुख्य अंश) सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Parvati Sahasranama Stotram ||

Om Parvati Girija Devi Himavatputrika Shubha |
Mahadevapriya Nityam Shiva Shailasuta Sati || 1 ||

Uma Haimavati Gauri Kalika Shulineepriya |
Shankarardhanagani Devi Ardhanareeshvari Tatha || 2 ||

Durga Bhavani Ambika Jagadamba Jagatprasuh |
Mahakali Mahalakshmi Mahasarasvati Shiva || 3 ||

Navadurga Dashamahavidya Shodashamatrika |
Nandini Menakaputri Dakshayani Sureshvari || 4 ||

Katyayani Mahagauri Chandraghanta Kushmandini |
Skandamata Shailaputri Brahmacharini Tapasi || 5 ||

Siddhidatri Kalaratri Chamunda Shaktirupini |
Mahishasuramardini Raktabijavinashini || 6 ||

Annapurna Vishalakshi Kamakshi Minakshi Tatha |
Lalita Tripurasundari Shodashi Bhuvaneshvari || 7 ||

Vanadurga Vindhyavasini Simhavahini Chandika |
Chamundeshvari Jvalamukhi Tara Matangini || 8 ||

Dhumavati Bagala Chhinnamasta Bhairavi Tatha |
Sarasvati Lakshmi Sita Radha Satyabhama Shachi || 9 ||

Sarvamangalamangalyam Shive Sarvarthasadhike |
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namostu Te || 10 ||

|| Iti Shri Parvati Sahasranama Stotram (Mukhya Amsha) Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
पार्वती, गिरिजा, हिमवत्पुत्री, महादेवप्रिया, शिवा, शैलसुता, सती — इन नामों से माता पार्वती का स्मरण।

उमा, गौरी, दुर्गा, भवानी, अम्बिका, जगदम्बा, महाकाली, महालक्ष्मी, महासरस्वती।

नवदुर्गा, दशमहाविद्या, अन्नपूर्णा, कामाक्षी, मीनाक्षी, ललिता, त्रिपुरसुन्दरी।

सर्वमंगलमांगल्य, सर्वार्थसाधिका, शरण्या, त्र्यम्बका गौरी नारायणी को नमस्कार।
benefits: Thousand names of Mata Parvati covering all her forms
Invokes Navadurga, Dasha Mahavidya, and Shodasha Matrika
Grants all mangala, protection, and spiritual powers
Supreme stotra for Navratri, Durga Puja, and Shivratri
Bestows saubhagya, shakti, and moksha to devotees
description: Dedicated to Goddess Parvati, the Parvati Sahasranama Stotram (पार्वती सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्) is a sacred recitation of 1000 divine names revered in Hindu tradition. This sacred composition is sourced from Shiva Purana and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to supreme stotra for Navratri, Durga Puja, and Shivratri as well as thousand names of Mata Parvati covering all her forms. Additionally, it is known to invoke Navadurga, Dasha Mahavidya, and Shodasha Matrika. For best results, devotees chant this on Monday (Somvar) and Friday (Shukravar) and during Navratri, Maha Shivaratri, and Durga Puja. Comprising 10 verses, it can be completed in approximately 8 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Parvati Sahasranama Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Parvati Sahasranama in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Thousand names of Mata Parvati for protection, saubhagya, and devotion.
